description: Make issues a gap-sibling first-class open-work kind: a task addresses an issue as it addresses a framework-gap; an open issue ranks and focuses in currentState as an open gap does; a completed task addressing an unresolved issue is invariant-flagged. Add the parity vocabulary in live .context config and the packaged catalog, plus two additive issue-schema fields. The deriver and lens-view are kind-general — change no deriver code. Preserve the divergences in criterion 7. Prerequisite for addressing issue-004 by a task.
acceptance_criteria: relation_types task_addresses_issue (source tasks, target issues, data_flow) and issue_relates_to_issue (source/target issues, data_flow) registered in live config and samples/conception.json. A task_addresses_issue edge writes and passes context-validate-relations. A fresh accept-all substrate accepts the same edge.

Invariant task-completed-issue-resolved (severity warning) registered in live config and catalog. context-validate raises it for a completed task that task_addresses_issue an issue with status != resolved; silent when resolved.

state_derivation.next_ranked has an issues entry: kind issues, label issue, bucket todo, rank_field priority, rank_order [critical, high, medium, low], reason_template — in live config and catalog. currentState ranks an open issue in nextActions, ordered as an open gap. No deriver code change.
schemas/issues.schema.json gains additive optional resolved_at and an x-lifecycle block, in the live schema and catalog. Existing issue items validate unchanged.
Lenses issues-by-status and issues-by-priority registered in live config and catalog; bins project correctly.
A fresh init -> accept-all -> install substrate carries every new relation_type, invariant, lens, and schema field. No live-only vocabulary.

Unchanged: issues status labels (open/resolved/deferred), priority scale (low..critical), category facet, and the escalation-sink asymmetry (no decision_raises_issue or issue->missing-convention analogs).

build, check, test: 0 failures. Cross-substrate runtime demo on live .context and a fresh catalog substrate: a task addresses an issue; an open issue ranks and focuses in currentState as a gap; completing the task resolves the issue and the invariant is satisfied. Fresh adversarial probe: no live-only vocabulary, no deriver code change, additive-only schema, divergences intact.
notes: Addresses FGAP-098. Prerequisite for addressing issue-004 by a task. Catalog back-port interacts with FGAP-094, TASK-066, TASK-067.
